heading: View Atlas Network Peering Connections
body:
**Atlascli:**

Atlas CLI

To return the details for all network peering connections in the project you specify using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas networking peering list [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas networking peering list](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-networking-peering-list).

**Ui:**

Atlas UI

To view your network peering connections using the Atlas UI:
